name: Hot & Sour Soup B1
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Bamboo shoots, drained, rinsed, and shredded
1/4 lb Boneless pork, trimmed of fat, sliced 1-1/2 x 2 in
2 Squares fresh Chinese bean curd (3 x 3 x 1-1/2 in.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cloud ear mushrooms and tiger lily buds in half a cup of warm water for 10 minutes. Drain and shred the mushrooms. Cut the tiger lily buds into one-half inch lengths.
2. Measure and place all remaining ingredients nearby for cooking.
3. Add the chicken stock, salt, soy sauce, bamboo shoots, pork, shredded mushrooms, and sliced tiger lily buds to a three-quart saucepan.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 3 minutes.
6. Add the shredded bean curd, ground white pepper, and white vinegar. Return to a boil.
7. Stir in the cornstarch mixture until it recombines, then pour into the saucepan.
8. Stir until the soup thickens.
9. Slowly pour the beaten egg into the soup, stirring constantly with a fork until the egg forms cooked shreds.
10. Stir in the sesame oil and garnish with chopped scallions.
11. Serve hot in individual bowls.
Temperature: HOT
Effort: DIFFICULT
Time: 00:30
